ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gini_coefficient" REAL /* Gini coefficient of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the score */,
  "happiness_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of happiness for the country */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Overall happiness score */,
  "lower_confidence_interval" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  "upper_confidence_interval" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the score */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the happiness data */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for collecting the happiness data */,
  "survey_year" INTEGER /* Year when the happiness survey was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_factors" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic factor entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the economic data */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita for the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_factors" (
  "social_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social factor entry */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country associated with the social data */,
  "family_score" REAL /* Family support score */,
  "health_score" REAL /* Health score based on life expectancy */,
  "freedom_score" REAL /* Freedom score indicating personal freedoms */,
  "generosity_score" REAL /* Generosity score based on charitable actions */,
  "trust_score" REAL /* Trust score reflecting government corruption levels */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support score */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("social_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_factors_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, policy maker, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the happiness score being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the score was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("score_id") REFERENCES happiness_scores ("score_id")
)
